# Rapid7

## RSA 2026
- **Booth number and hall:** S-3201, South Expo Hall. (Note: Another source indicated Booth 3102, but S-3201 is from a more recent announcement regarding their presence at the conference).
- **Any updated booth info from the conference floor:** Rapid7 is spotlighting its newest capabilities in proactive security, threat intelligence, and hands-on demonstrations. These demonstrations are designed to help IT teams transition from reactive to proactive defense strategies. They are also inviting attendees to discuss evolving security threats.
